---
title: "Misperception of Multiple Risks in Medical Decision-Making"
jcr-mode: manuscript
format: jcrquarto-pdf
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

\begin{center}
\textbf{WEB APPENDIX}
\end{center}

\vspace{\baselineskip}

**Table of Contents**

Web Appendix A: Stimuli and Scenarios \dotfill\ 2

Web Appendix B: Attention Check and Numeracy Items \dotfill\ 3

Web Appendix C: Pilot Study Results \dotfill\ 4

Web Appendix D: Analyses without Covariates \dotfill\ 5

\newpage

# Web Appendix A: Stimuli and Scenarios {.unnumbered}

This web appendix presents the stimuli and medical scenarios used across
the eight studies reported in the main article.

\newpage

# Web Appendix B: Attention Check and Numeracy Items {.unnumbered}

This web appendix describes the attention check items and the Berlin
numeracy test used in the studies.

\newpage

# Web Appendix C: Pilot Study Results {.unnumbered}

This web appendix reports detailed results from the pilot study on the
categorization of quantitative risk information.

\newpage

# Web Appendix D: Analyses without Covariates {.unnumbered}

This web appendix reports the main analyses without including numeracy
and experience as covariates.
